description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a minimalist rectangular layout and a flat roof design. The structure features two main volumes: a larger living area and a smaller detached section, likely a garage or guest suite, both connected by a paved courtyard. Large glass panels dominate the facade, providing expansive views and natural light, while the exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete and wood accents. A spacious swimming pool is integrated into the courtyard, bordered by clean, geometric lines and a wide patio area. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open space and functional outdoor living. The house is set on a broad, flat platform, suggesting a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A sleek, modern single-story house with flat roofs, large glass panels, and a spacious courtyard featuring a swimming pool. The design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main living area with large glass panels, the pool, and the detached smaller structure on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building, the pool's position, and the smaller structure at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main house, the pool, and the smaller structure on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, the connecting courtyard, and the flat roofs of both structures.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door with a minimal overhang, flush with the facade, and a paved approach without steps or decorative columns.
